## Convention name

<!-- The canonical name of the file, convention, or protocol -->

## What it does

<!-- One or two sentences. What problem does it solve? Who uses it? -->

## Evidence of adoption

## Public spec or canonical reference

<!-- A spec, official docs, or canonical repo. A blog post alone does not qualify. -->

## Is this a file-based convention or open protocol?

<!-- Confirm: this is not a framework, library, or hosted product. -->

- [ ] Yes, it is a file format, filename convention, or communication protocol.
